DISEASE: Chickenpox
SYMPTOMS: itching, skin rash, fatigue, lethargy, high fever, loss of appetite, mild fever, swelled lymph nodes, malaise, red spots over body
SYMPTOM_SYNONYMS: itching related discomfort, mild itching, severe itching, itching sensation
